qa_pair.question: For postal code 64000 in Mexico, what is the 2-digit state code returned by the geocodes API?
How many active services does Estafeta offer for Mexico according to the Queries API? Respond with a number.
Is postal code 99999 a valid Mexican postal code according to the Envia geocodes API? Respond "yes" or "no".
What is the 3-digit state code for postal code 06700 (Roma Norte, CDMX) according to the geocodes API?
How many total carriers are available in Mexico according to the Envia Queries API? Respond with a number.
For postal code 97000 in Mexico (Mérida), what state name does the geocodes API return?
How many services does DHL offer for Mexico according to the Queries API? Respond with a number.
What is the timezone for postal code 44100 (Guadalajara) according to the Envia geocodes API?
Get shipping quotes from postal code 64000 (Monterrey) to 06700 (CDMX) for a 2kg box (30x20x15 cm). Which carrier offers the cheapest option? Respond with the carrier string (e.g., "dhl").
For postal code 01000 in Mexico, how many neighborhoods (suburbs/colonias) does the geocodes API return? Respond with a number.
